ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., US 2, US 4) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "hollow_to_floor" REAL /* Measurement from hollow to floor in inches */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the size applies to */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., 'Small', 'Medium') */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of sizes (e.g., 'XS-XL', 'S-XXL') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., 'NA', 'EU') */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment (e.g., Dress, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the garment belongs to */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric used for the garment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern on the garment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Women's Wear, Men's Wear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment being produced */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being produced */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of garments to be produced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of production (e.g., 'in_progress', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manufacturer, salesperson) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Design, Manufacturing, Sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource being accessed (e.g., garment, size, inventory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being tracked */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being tracked */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was recorded */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size sold in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_turnover" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse being tracked */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment being tracked */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being tracked */,
  "turnover_date" TEXT /* Date when the turnover data was recorded */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment sold in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_turnover_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_turnover_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_turnover_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)
